title: KB2005_11.C.36_1360_202210171441
description:
New version: KB2005_11.C.36_1360_202210171441

This update enhances system security and fixes a camera issue.

System

• Integrates the October 2022 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Camera

• Fixes a stutter issue that affects video recording in some scenarios.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
